case_title: DANIEL SALAZAR et al VS. MICHAEL BALOPOULOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $486.00 FILED BY SALAZAR, DANIEL SALAZAR, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT BALOPOULOS, MICHAEL DBA LIBERAL LOAN OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, DANIEL SALAZAR, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALOPOULOS, MICHAEL DBA LIBERAL LOAN OFFICE $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $350.00- REDUCED BY $150.00 FOR THE AMOUNT OF THE ORIGINAL LAWN AT PAWN.
